state_space: Distributed ledger appending a chain of cryptographic hash blocks
dynamics_operator: Proof-of-Work hashing, block propagation, longest-chain rule adoption (Linearized approximation applied)
perturbation_operator: Network partitions, adversarial hash power, selfish mining
stability_condition: Honest node hash rate > 50% of total network hash rate
failure_mode: 51% attack, deep chain reorganization, double spending
notes: State persistence relies on continuous competitive energy expenditure.
persistence_ontology_rationale: Derived via structural matching of observables and dynamics to ontology definitions.

metric_layer.distance_definition: Numeric distance strictly derived from domain object fields.

assumptions: Assumed no numeric boundaries exist since none provided.

measurement_layer.distance_provenance: Deterministically triaged via M-Layer v0 rules.
